name: scavenger
description: Grid-world scavenger hunt. Agent must find a target object, pick it up, and deliver it to a destination — through walls, around pits, with a finite move budget. Mechanics mirror skillos_robot's look-navigate-act loop: same compiled-state shape (labeled objects + bearings + distances), same opcode set, same OS/Program separation. A working LLM-OS demo of Scavenger transfers almost directly to a real-world physical scavenger task with a robot embodiment.

move.summary: Move one cell in the given direction. Blocked by walls; ends game on pit.

pickup.summary: Pick up the object at the agent's current cell. Fails if cell is empty or agent already carrying something.

drop.summary: Drop the carried object onto the agent's current cell. Fails if not carrying anything.

look.summary: Observe surroundings without advancing the move counter. Returns compiled scene state.
